title: Donguler (for/while/each)
subtitle: Farkli dongu turleri ve iterator metodlar.
code:
# for dongusu (1'den 5'e)
puts "1'den 5'e kadar:"
for i in 1..5
  puts "Sayi: #{i}"
end

# while dongusu
puts "\nGeri sayim:"
counter = 5
while counter > 0
  puts counter
  counter -= 1
end

# each ile dizi uzerinde dongu (idiomatic Ruby)
puts "\nMeyveler:"
fruits = ["Elma", "Armut", "Muz", "Karpuz"]
fruits.each do |fruit|
  puts "- #{fruit}"
end

# each_with_index
puts "\nIndeksli liste:"
fruits.each_with_index do |fruit, index|
  puts "#{index}: #{fruit}"
end

# times metodu
puts "\ntimes ornegi:"
3.times do |n|
  puts "n = #{n}"
end

# Range ve map
squares = (1..5).map { |x| x * x }
puts "\nKareler: #{squares}"
